category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides intelligent Kotlin support for editors and IDEs using the Language Server Protocol; official GitHub repository is kotlin-language-server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kotlin-language-server; official repository name and README identify the Kotlin language server.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for installation and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/fwcd/kotlin-language-server; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly references Kotlin editor/IDE support and the Language Server Protocol.
